subject: Your Carolina Savings statement is ready
snippet: Your monthly checking statement for account ending 4471 is now available...
body:
Hi Jordan,

Your monthly statement for the account ending ••••4471 is now available in online banking. Log in at carolinasavingsbank.com to view it.

Thank you for banking with Carolina Savings Bank.

subject: Low balance alert — checking ••••4471
snippet: Your available balance dropped below $500 on March 14...
body: Jordan, this is an automated alert. The available balance on your checking account ending ••••4471 dropped below $500 on 03/14. This alert is a courtesy notification only.\n\nCarolina Savings Bank

subject: Your Verizon bill is ready to view
snippet: Your bill of $84.31 is due March 22...
body:
Hi Jordan,

Your Verizon Wireless bill of $84.31 is ready. Payment is due by March 22. You are enrolled in Auto Pay, so no action is needed.

Manage your account at verizon.com.

subject: Auto policy renewal — payment due
snippet: Your six-month auto premium of $612 is due by February 28...
body:
Dear Jordan McDaniel,

Your six-month auto insurance premium of $612.00 for policy 4419-88-207 is due by February 28. You may pay in full or set up installments at geico.com.

Thank you for choosing GEICO.

subject: Your February energy bill
snippet: Your Duke Energy bill of $103.47 is due March 5...
body: Hello Jordan,\n\nYour Duke Energy Progress bill for the service at 418 East Jones Street is $103.47, due March 5. View usage details and pay online at duke-energy.com.

subject: Your Lie-Nielsen order LN-58231 has shipped
snippet: Good news — your No. 7 jointer plane is on its way...
body:
Hi Jordan,

Your order LN-58231 has shipped via UPS Ground.

- No. 7 Jointer Plane

Tracking: 1Z999AA10123456784
Estimated delivery: March 12.

Thanks for supporting handmade tools.
Lie-Nielsen Toolworks

subject: Order confirmation #WC-441902
snippet: Thanks for your order. We've received it and will email when it ships...
body:
Thanks for your order, Jordan!

Order #WC-441902
- Bessey K-Body parallel clamps (24 in), qty 2
- Titebond III, 16 oz

Subtotal: $128.90
We'll email you when it ships.

Woodcraft

subject: Rockler order #RK-7729104 confirmed
snippet: We received your order for the router table insert plate...
body:
Hi Jordan,

We received your Rockler order #RK-7729104.
- Router table insert plate, aluminum
- Featherboard set

Order total: $91.44
You'll get a shipping notice soon.

Rockler Woodworking and Hardware

subject: Your Etsy order is confirmed
snippet: Your leather tool roll from OldGrainLeatherCo is on its way...
body:
Hi Jordan,

Thanks for your purchase from OldGrainLeatherCo.
- Handmade leather chisel roll, 12 slot

Total: $74.00
The shop will ship within 3-5 business days.

Etsy

subject: Spring hours check-in + OSHA module
snippet: Jordan, you're on track for Year 3 hours. Don't forget the OSHA-10 refresh...
body:
Jordan,

You're on track with your Year 3 apprenticeship hours — nice work. Two things:
1. The OSHA-10 refresh module is due end of March in Google Classroom.
2. Let's do a Zoom check-in the week of the 23rd. Send me a couple times that work around your job-site schedule.

Mark Sullivan
Wake Tech Carpentry Apprenticeship

subject: Apprenticeship progress notice — Year 3 of 4
snippet: This is your term progress summary for the carpentry apprenticeship program...
body:
Dear Jordan McDaniel,

This notice confirms your enrollment status in the Carpentry Apprenticeship program (Year 3 of 4). Your recorded on-the-job hours are current. Journeyman certification eligibility is projected for spring 2027.

Wake Technical Community College — Registrar

subject: Re: Spring hours check-in + OSHA module
snippet: thursday after 4 works. wednesday if the deck job wraps early...
body:
thursday after 4 works. wednesday if the apex deck wraps early, i'll text you.

i'll knock out the osha module this weekend.

jordan

subject: Wake Forest kitchen — cabinet delivery pushed
snippet: Heads up the cabinet delivery slipped to Thursday. Trim can go ahead...
body:
Jordan,

Cabinet delivery for the Wake Forest kitchen slipped to Thursday. You and Greg can keep going on the window trim and the pantry framing in the meantime. Uploaded the revised layout to Box.

Paul Hensley
Hensley Construction

subject: Re: Wake Forest kitchen — cabinet delivery pushed
snippet: got it. we'll knock out the trim and pantry framing thursday morning...
body: got it. we'll knock out the trim and pantry framing. should be ready for cabinets when they land.\n\njordan

subject: Sunday lunch + did you call the dentist??
snippet: Hi honey! Dad's doing brisket Sunday. Also please please call the dentist...
body:
Hi honey!

Dad's smoking a brisket Sunday, come hungry. Bring Nate if he wants.

Also — please call the dentist. You've rescheduled twice now. It takes five minutes. I already put the number in your phone. Love you.

Mom

subject: Re: Sunday lunch + did you call the dentist??
snippet: he's not gonna call the dentist mom lol. jordan i'll do your teeth myself...
body: he's not gonna call the dentist mom lol. jordan i literally clean teeth for a living, just come by the office. also you still have my netflix login so you owe me a plate of that brisket.

subject: Re: Sunday lunch + did you call the dentist??
snippet: i'll be there. bringing a growler. i'll call the dentist i swear...
body: i'll be there sunday. bringing a growler from lynnwood. i'll call the dentist, i swear. kayla you'll get your brisket.

subject: Trophy gig confirmed — Oct 17
snippet: Trophy booked us for Oct 17, 8pm set. Locking the setlist at practice...
body:
boys — Trophy Brewing confirmed us for Oct 17, 8pm set. Load in at 6:30.

We'll lock the setlist at practice. Thinking we open with the Isbell cover and close on the new one. Jordan bring the fretless.

Travis

subject: Timber Creek — Oct 17 taproom set details
snippet: Confirming your set at Trophy Brewing Company on October 17...
body:
Hi Timber Creek,

Confirming your set at Trophy Brewing Company on Saturday, October 17. Load-in 6:30 PM, set 8:00-10:30 PM. PA is provided; bring your own DI boxes. We'll post the show to our socials the week of.

Thanks,
Trophy Brewing Booking

subject: This month at Lincoln Theatre — shows on sale
snippet: New shows just announced downtown. Americana night returns...
body:
Hey Raleigh,

New shows just announced at Lincoln Theatre. Americana Night returns this spring, plus touring acts all month. Tickets on sale Friday at lincolntheatre.com.

See you downtown.

subject: New IPA release + live music weekends
snippet: Our fresh hop IPA drops this weekend, plus live music Friday and Saturday...
body:
Cheers Jordan,

Our fresh-hop IPA drops this weekend and it's a juicy one. Live music Friday and Saturday nights on the patio. Growler fills half off Wednesdays.

Lynnwood Brewing Concern

subject: March rent
snippet: Got the Venmo, thanks. Heads up the water heater guy comes Tuesday...
body: Jordan — got the Venmo for March, thanks. Heads up, I've got a plumber coming Tuesday morning to look at the water heater, so someone should be around or leave it unlocked. Let me know.\n\nRay

subject: band site is back up
snippet: Fixed the DNS thing on the Timber Creek site, it's live again...
body: hey — fixed the DNS thing on the timbercreek site, it's live again. also the shows page pulls from a calendar now so just add gigs to that shared cal and it updates automatically. borrow the laptop whenever.\n\nnate

subject: trim job lead in cary
snippet: Guy I know needs finish trim work on a flip, might be side money for you...
body: jordan — buddy of mine is flipping a house in cary and needs finish trim, crown and baseboard. told him you do clean work. want me to pass your number? could be weekend cash.\n\nmarcus

subject: Walnut and cherry restock — The Hardwood Store of NC
snippet: Fresh walnut, cherry, and white oak just hit the racks in Gibsonville...
body:
Hi Jordan,

We just restocked walnut, cherry, and quartersawn white oak at our Gibsonville store. 4/4 and 8/4 available. Come pull your own boards or order online at thehardwoodstore.com.

The Hardwood Store of NC

subject: Automatic transfer completed
snippet: Your scheduled transfer to your savings account completed on Feb 1...
body:
Hi Jordan,

Your scheduled monthly transfer to the account ending ••••8830 completed on February 1. Automatic transfers help you reach your savings goals.

Carolina Savings Bank

subject: CONGRATULATIONS you have been selected!!!
snippet: You have won a $1,000 gift card, claim now within 24 hours...
body:
Dear Winner,

Your email address has been selected to receive a $1,000 gift card. Click the link and confirm your details within 24 hours to claim your prize!!!

Prize Department

subject: W-2 for your taxes
snippet: Attached your W-2 for the year. Payroll sent it over...
body: Jordan — attaching your W-2 for last year, payroll finally sent it over. Print it or forward to whoever does your taxes. See you at the Wake Forest site Monday, 6:30.\n\nGreg

subject: Woodpeckers order shipped — WP-330281
snippet: Your 12-inch woodworking square has shipped...
body:
Hi Jordan,

Your Woodpeckers order WP-330281 has shipped.
- 1281 Woodworking Square, 12 in

Tracking will update within 24 hours. Thanks for the order.

Woodpeckers

subject: your grandma's old hand plane
snippet: Found Grandpa's old Stanley plane cleaning out the garage, it's yours...
body: Honey, we were cleaning out the garage and found Grandpa McDaniel's old Stanley hand plane. Dad said you'd want it. It's rusty but you're the one who'd know how to bring it back. I'll set it aside for Sunday. xo Mom
